## Source: amazon-inspector (c58f691cfdb7301c271067776e2e3bc260d4cbb8880345d03e840729d849b580)

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (9bbf1badd9e8d2be29855017cbd2d690f33885c0884c653412d7d4e463656494)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@tc-core/campus-service' @ 0.0.0-defensive-callback (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
